dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7913 IH: Higher Education Challenge Grant Modernization Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. McClain Delaney (for herself and Mr. Vindman) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Food and Agriculture Act of 1977 to reauthorize grants and fellowships for food and agricultural sciences education, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Higher Education Challenge Grant Modernization Act.

section.header: Grants and fellowships for food and agricultural sciences education

subsection.text: Section 1417(c) of the Food and Agriculture Act of 1977 (7 U.S.C. 3152(c)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (2), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:
applications for teaching enhancement projects, including paid work-based learning, that address a need for additional trained professionals in—

subparagraph.text: rural economic, community, and business development.

subsection.text: Section 1417(m) of the Food and Agriculture Act of 1977 (7 U.S.C. 3152(m)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (2), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:
$60,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2035.
